---
listing:
  contents:
    - Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex01.qmd
    - Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex02.qmd
    - Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex03a.qmd
    - Hands-on_Ex/Hands-on_Ex03b.qmd
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title, description]
---
```{=html}
<div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px 0 10px 0;">
  <p style="font-family: 'Georgia', serif;
             font-size: 0.85rem; 
             color: #555555;
             letter-spacing: 0.18em;
             text-transform: uppercase;
             margin-bottom: 8px;">
    Welcome to my
  </p>
  <img src="images/welcome-text.png" 
       alt="Visual Analytics Journey" 
       style="max-width: 350px; width: 60%;"/>
</div>
```

### Welcome

Hi, I am **Carina** and welcome to my course portfolio for **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications**.
